author: mrmartineau

commands.description: Search the ZUI documentation and open pages in your browser
commands.name: search-docs
commands.subtitle: ZUI
commands.title: Search Documentation

commands.description: Search ZUI CSS classes and copy or paste the class name
commands.name: search-classes
commands.subtitle: ZUI
commands.title: Search CSS Classes

commands.description: Search ZUI design tokens and copy or paste the CSS custom property
commands.name: search-tokens
commands.subtitle: ZUI
commands.title: Search Design Tokens

commands.description: Search ZUI component examples and copy or paste the snippet for your framework — HTML, React, Astro, Solid, Svelte, or Vue
commands.name: search-snippets
commands.subtitle: ZUI
commands.title: Search Snippets

commands.description: Fetch the latest ZUI reference data (docs, classes, tokens, snippets) from the ZUI website
commands.name: update-data
commands.subtitle: ZUI
commands.title: Update ZUI Data

description: Search ZUI documentation, CSS classes, design tokens, and framework snippets
name: zui

scripts.build: pnpm run generate:data && ray build -e dist
scripts.generate:data: pnpm --filter vscode-zui run build:manifest && tsx scripts/generate-data.ts
scripts.typecheck: pnpm run generate:data && tsc --noEmit && tsc --noEmit -p scripts

title: ZUI
